overview.title: Overview
overview.intro: As the server President, you are responsible for reviewing and approving vote proposals submitted by council members. This is a crucial role in the server's governance system.

responsibilities.title: Your Responsibilities:
items: Reject proposals that are unclear, inappropriate, or don't require a vote
Provide clear feedback when rejecting proposals
Act in a timely manner (within 12 hours when possible)

overview.auto_approval_note: Auto-Approval Safety Net: If you don't review a proposal within 12 hours, it will automatically be approved and a vote will be created. This prevents bottlenecks but means you should check this page regularly.

proposal_table.title: Understanding the Proposal Table
proposal_table.intro: The table displays all pending vote proposals that require your review:

columns.submitted_by: Submitted By: The council member who created the proposal (shown as email address)
columns.title: Title: The vote title - should be clear and concise
columns.description: Description: Detailed explanation of what is being voted on - click to expand if truncated
columns.category: Category: The type of vote (Rule Change, Alliance Dispute, Territory Decision, Event Planning, Other)
columns.submitted_at: Submitted At: When the proposal was created
columns.time_remaining: Time Remaining: Countdown until auto-approval (12 hours from submission)

proposal_table.priority_warning: Priority Review: Proposals with less time remaining should be reviewed first. Look for red "URGENT" indicators showing less than 2 hours remain.

how_to_approve.title: How to Approve a Proposal
steps: Read carefully: Review the title, description, and category
Assess legitimacy: Is this a council-level decision? Is it clear what is being voted on?
Consider timing: Is now a good time for this vote? (e.g., not during major events)
Automatic actions: Vote is created immediately and DMs are sent to all council members

after_approval.title: What happens after approval:
items: Vote is created in Discord bot system
All 7 council members receive Discord DM with vote details
Proposal is removed from your pending list

criteria: ✅ Not already covered by existing rules/votes

help.title: How Vote Proposals Work
help.intro: As a council member, you can propose votes to the council. Your proposal will be sent to the president for approval.
help.admin_note: As president/admin, your votes will be created immediately without approval.
help.auto_approval: If the president doesn't respond within 12 hours, your proposal will be automatically approved.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.max_length: Must be no more than {{length}} characters

errors.no_session: Please log in to access this page.
errors.expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.revoked: Your session has been revoked. Please log in again.
errors.invalid: Invalid session. Please log in again.
errors.key_rotated: Security keys have been rotated. Please log in again for your security.
errors.unknown_email: Email address not recognized or not authorized.
errors.send_failed: Failed to send magic link. Please try again.

success.sent: Magic link sent! Check your email and click the link to log in.

info.title: How it works:
steps: Receive a secure login link via email
Click the link to access your dashboard

report.description: Describe the problem you're experiencing. This will notify the admin team with details about your session.
report.label: Problem Description
report.placeholder: Describe what you were trying to do and what went wrong...
report.context_title: The following information will be included automatically:

validation.required: Please describe the problem you're experiencing.

report.success: Problem report submitted successfully! An admin will be notified.
report.error: Failed to submit problem report. Please try again.

magic_link.subject: Your Login Link for {{app_name}}
magic_link.intro: You requested access to the {{app_name}} Dashboard. Click the button below to securely log in:
magic_link.alternative_text: Copy and paste this link into your browser:

security_items.single_use: This link is single-use only and will become invalid after your first successful login
security_items.no_share: Never share this link with anyone - it grants full access to your admin account
security_items.ignore: If you didn't request this login, you can safely ignore this email
security_items.no_reuse: For security, the link cannot be reused once clicked

magic_link.no_reply_text: This is an automated message from a no-reply email address. Please do not reply to this email as this mailbox is not monitored. For support, contact your server administrator.

role_change.subject: {{app_name}} - Your Access Has Been Updated
role_change.intro: An administrator has updated your access permissions for the {{app_name}} admin panel.
role_change.questions_text: These changes are effective immediately. If you have any questions or believe this change was made in error, please contact an administrator.
role_change.access_text: To access the admin panel, request a magic link at the login page or contact an admin to send you a login link.
role_change.footer_notification: This is an automated notification from {{app_name}}
role_change.footer_unexpected: If you did not expect this change, please contact your alliance administrator immediately

test.subject: {{app_name}} - SMTP Test Email
test.title: ✅ SMTP Test Successful
test.congratulations: Congratulations! If you received this email, your SMTP configuration is working correctly.
test.next_steps_text: You can now proceed with deploying the JWT admin system. The magic link authentication will work correctly.
test.no_reply_text: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email as this mailbox is not monitored.

council_rotation.subject: {{app_name}} - Council Rotation Schedule Updated
council_rotation.title: 🗳️ Council Rotation Updated
council_rotation.intro: The council rotation schedule has been regenerated for the next {{weeks}} weeks. All future rotating council seats (ranks 6-15) have been recalculated to ensure fair distribution.
council_rotation.notice_text: The regeneration only affects future weeks. All past and current week rotations remain unchanged.
council_rotation.footer_notification: This is an automated notification from {{app_name}}.
council_rotation.footer_no_reply: Please do not reply to this email.

vote_notification.subject: New Council Vote
vote_notification.title: New Council Vote
vote_notification.subtitle: Your vote is required
vote_notification.discord_alternative: You can also vote via Discord by replying to the bot's DM with: vote: yes, vote: no, or vote: abstain
vote_notification.security_notice: This is a one-time voting link valid for 48 hours. Do not share this link with anyone. If you didn't expect this vote, please contact an administrator.

emails.no_reply_notice: This is an automated message from a no-reply email address. Please do not reply to this email.
